{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603211202302D9A80BEAA563DB1CAB1"}"},"total":427},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7608523438990295832","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"没得说，现在看还没有什么太大毒点，主要就是更新速度没跟上[重拳出击]。看简介，波奇酱应该会变成病娇，有点小期待后期波奇酱病娇加修罗场。听起来就感觉很赞！","text_exts":[{"e":66,"s":63,"text":"修罗场","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%BF%AE%E7%BD%97%E5%9C%BA&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317740657503DB1CAB1%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227608523438990295832%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227595172538678791193%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%BF%AE%E7%BD%97%E5%9C%BA%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771499396,"group_id":"7595172538678791193","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"堵桥来。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3y2UmsER/JePQBBBeM4xvfO/RZI5R7MGz/1JqaCN5KT","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/57395090088640caab1f4393a971ccb3~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776616755&x-signature=SM6vZU6S30Ez8zE1XDWiKxFkhvY%3D","user_id":"2815224699954632","user_name":"祖师三角洲经济学教父"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2815224699954632","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7595172538678791193","book_info":{"abstract":"穿越综漫世界，成为后藤家收养的长子，后藤沐只想在这个和平的世界苟到寿终正寝。
然而，随身绑定的【次元攻略系统】却对他发出了死亡预告
【叮！检测到宿主成年，灵魂与世界的排异反应加剧】
【症状描述：由于前世灵魂受损，宿主的生命力正在快速流失。如果不摄入足够的高纯度情感能量，宿主将在72小时后因生命力枯竭而猝死】
因为前世死过一次，后藤沐患上了严重的“死亡恐惧症”
为了活下去，根本不认识任何动漫角色的他，被迫化身中央空调，不仅要拼命刷好感，还得时刻关注对方心理健康。
直到后来，他发现身边这些原本只是“稍微有点心理问题”的少女们，看他的眼神逐渐充满了沉重的爱意。
《春物》、《小埋》、《辉夜》、《路人女主》《蜡笔小新》《刀剑神域》《假面骑士空我》
当后藤沐看着暴涨的寿命，以为终于可以安心养老时，家里那个社恐的粉色野槌蛇出事了。
“嘿嘿……原来哥哥是爸妈给我的……丈夫……”
“那为什么……老公要去给别的女人做饭呢？”
“不可原谅……不可原谅……”
（眼镜会在40多章取下）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b4ef60c25778842904be9766ef795bed","author":"霜雪须臾","author_id":"","book_id":"7595172538678791193","book_name":"综漫：波奇家的童养夫","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f0d0c0","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":465,"name":"综漫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=465&name=综漫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7596707473851957822","read_count":"53261","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"356374"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.0","serial_count":"150","tags":"动漫衍生,穿越,二次元,综漫,同人,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2oe8285c7dd788da776c32713bd5880e3f~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779249750&x-signature=kVyoe3vVhMMT4t%2B%2F2QsWzh0J6TY%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4340472263748222","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"82"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603211202302D9A80BEAA563DB1CAB1"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读40分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":16,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_
